title: Has this ever been contemplated
wikitext:
[]: Has this ever been contemplated?             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Feb 07, 2007 12:19 pm Would it be possible to find a Japan-based Evangelion website (which is just as productive as this one) and get some form of communication together to see if the Japanese fans have any similar theories or if they have any better conclusions to things that we may be unable to pick up due the language barrier?

[]: Re: Has this ever been contemplated?             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Feb 07, 2007 12:30 pm Szmitten wrote: Would it be possible to find a Japan-based Evangelion website (which is just as productive as this one) and get some form of communication together to see if the Japanese fans have any similar theories or if they have any better conclusions to things that we may be unable to pick up due the language barrier?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Feb 07, 2007 2:48 pm O RLY? Are they claiming THEY don't do that and we do? Personally, I don't see us Amercian fans doing that! :shock: What are THEY talking about? er...wait. *re-reads post* Oh you're saying they overanaylze things? Jeez, no wonder Anno had to go and change around Misato's scene in 21' after Kaji's "Yo, you're late. It's time for me to die!" :roll: That would be interesting though, but the lanauage barrier might be a bit of a problem.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Wed Feb 07, 2007 3:24 pm I remember seeing a post recently where someone (Reichu?) had been to a Japanese Evangelion board and they were sure that Naoko's soul was in Zerogouki ... yeah Edit: :shock: I'm Ramiel. All your base are belong to us. As soon as I can get through the crispy shell!

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Thu Feb 08, 2007 8:39 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: I remember seeing a post recently where someone (Reichu?) had been to a Japanese Evangelion board and they were sure that Naoko's soul was in Zerogouki ... yeah!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 08, 2007 9:53 am ORAMI!? wrote: Oh, that's nothing. I've heard some overseas fans think that Adam is female.

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Thu Feb 08, 2007 10:11 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: ORAMI!? wrote: Oh, that's nothing. I've heard some overseas fans think that Adam is female.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Feb 08, 2007 10:22 am I admit I have no clue what *RIM SHOT* means in this case. I've never seen it used in such a way before which is why I asked.

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Thu Feb 08, 2007 11:42 am Wikipedia wrote: A rimshot is the sound produced by hitting the rim and the head of a drum at once, with a drum stick. <snip> The term is erroneously used to refer to the sting played by the drummer in cabaret shows to accentuate the punchline of a joke. As a result, a particularly obvious laugh line is sometimes called a rimshot.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2007 3:39 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: I remember seeing a post recently where someone (Reichu?) had been to a Japanese Evangelion board and they were sure that Naoko's soul was in Zerogouki ... yeah
